diagrams.name: agent_configuration_and_setup
diagrams.title: Agent Configuration and Setup
diagrams.description: Developer defines agents with instructions, tools, and output schemas before running
diagrams.scope: Agent definition and initial configuration

diagrams.name: agent_run_loop_execution
diagrams.title: Agent Run Loop Execution
diagrams.description: Core execution loop: agent receives input, calls LLM, processes output, iterates turns
diagrams.scope: Core agent execution pipeline

diagrams.name: tool_registration_and_invocation
diagrams.title: Tool Registration and Invocation
diagrams.description: Developer registers tools; agent invokes them during runs and handles results
diagrams.scope: Tool lifecycle: registration, invocation, result handling

diagrams.name: agent_handoffs
diagrams.title: Agent Handoffs and Routing
diagrams.description: One agent hands off control to another agent; handoff prompts are generated and validated
diagrams.scope: Multi-agent routing and handoff mechanics

diagrams.name: mcp_server_integration
diagrams.title: MCP Server Integration
diagrams.description: Developer connects MCP servers; agent discovers and calls external tools via MCP protocol
diagrams.scope: Model Context Protocol server connection and tool discovery

diagrams.name: model_provider_integration
diagrams.title: Model Provider Integration
diagrams.description: Agent SDK interacts with OpenAI, Anthropic, and other LLM providers for completions
diagrams.scope: LLM provider abstraction and model invocation

diagrams.name: streaming_responses
diagrams.title: Streaming Responses and Event Handling
diagrams.description: Agent streams tokens/events back to the caller; stream events are processed and forwarded
diagrams.scope: Streaming output processing and event forwarding

diagrams.name: structured_output_and_schemas
diagrams.title: Structured Output and Schema Validation
diagrams.description: Developer defines output types; agent produces and validates structured responses
diagrams.scope: Typed structured output definition and validation

diagrams.name: tracing_and_span_management
diagrams.title: Tracing and Span Management
diagrams.description: Agent runs emit trace spans; processors record and export observability data
diagrams.scope: Distributed tracing, span lifecycle, and export pipeline

diagrams.name: error_handling_and_recovery
diagrams.title: Error Handling and Recovery
diagrams.description: Run errors are caught, classified, and delegated to registered error handlers
diagrams.scope: Error classification and custom handler dispatch

diagrams.name: guardrails
diagrams.title: Guardrails — Input and Output Filtering
diagrams.description: Input and output guardrails validate agent I/O, triggering tripwires when violated
diagrams.scope: Safety and policy enforcement on agent inputs/outputs

diagrams.name: sandbox_code_execution
diagrams.title: Sandbox Code Execution (E2B)
diagrams.description: Agent executes code and shell commands inside an isolated E2B sandbox environment
diagrams.scope: Isolated code execution and sandbox lifecycle management

diagrams.name: sandbox_session_management
diagrams.title: Sandbox Session Lifecycle Management
diagrams.description: Sessions are acquired, materialized, serialized for resume, and cleaned up after use
diagrams.scope: Sandbox session creation, suspension, and cleanup

diagrams.name: sandbox_memory_generation
diagrams.title: Sandbox Memory Generation and Persistence
diagrams.description: Rollout results are enqueued, processed in phases, and persisted as agent memory
diagrams.scope: Async memory generation pipeline from sandbox rollouts

diagrams.name: realtime_websocket_communication
diagrams.title: Realtime WebSocket Communication
diagrams.description: Client connects via WebSocket; audio and events are streamed bidirectionally to/from agent
diagrams.scope: Realtime bidirectional agent communication over WebSocket

diagrams.name: twilio_telephony_integration
diagrams.title: Twilio Telephony Integration
diagrams.description: Twilio WebSocket bridge relays phone call audio to the agent realtime session
diagrams.scope: Phone-to-agent audio bridging via Twilio WebSocket

diagrams.name: responses_api_and_openai_compatibility
diagrams.title: OpenAI Responses API Compatibility
diagrams.description: SDK adapts OpenAI Responses API objects, stripping incompatible fields and normalizing IDs
diagrams.scope: OpenAI Responses API normalization and compatibility layer

diagrams.name: run_configuration_and_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Run Configuration and Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Developer configures run parameters (max turns, model, tracing) and starts/stops runs
diagrams.scope: Top-level run parameters and execution lifecycle hooks

diagrams.name: temporal_workflow_extension
diagrams.title: Temporal Workflow Extension
diagrams.description: Agent sessions are orchestrated as Temporal workflows for durable, long-running execution
diagrams.scope: Durable workflow orchestration via Temporal extension

diagrams.name: financial_research_agent_example
diagrams.title: Financial Research Agent (Example)
diagrams.description: Orchestrator plans searches, performs web research, and generates a financial report
diagrams.scope: Multi-agent financial research pipeline example

diagrams.name: research_bot_example
diagrams.title: Research Bot (Example)
diagrams.description: Research manager plans searches, fetches results, and synthesizes a written report
diagrams.scope: General-purpose research and report generation example

diagrams.name: prompt_and_instructions_management
diagrams.title: Prompt and Instructions Management
diagrams.description: Developer provides static or dynamic instructions; SDK validates signatures and renders prompts
diagrams.scope: Prompt construction and instruction lifecycle

diagrams.name: capabilities_and_image_tools
diagrams.title: Capabilities and Image Tool Execution
diagrams.description: Agent uses capability-based tools (e.g., view_image) to inspect visual content
diagrams.scope: Multimodal capability tools and image viewing

diagrams.name: testing_infrastructure_and_fake_models
diagrams.title: Testing Infrastructure and Fake Models
diagrams.description: Test authors use fake models, dummy providers, and test helpers to validate agent behavior
diagrams.scope: Test doubles and helpers for agent SDK unit/integration tests
